title: ulmus campestris var. latifolia
intro: Ulmus campestris var. latifolia, also known as the European elm, is a deciduous tree species native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ulmus campestris var. latifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
